items.scenario: You recently booked a weekend kayaking tour through a local outdoor adventure company, and the confirmation email never mentioned that participants must bring their own life jackets. You do not own one, and the tour departs from the marina this Saturday morning.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Ellery. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain that the confirmation email did not mention life jacket requirements
Describe your lack of proper kayaking equipment
Ask whether the company can supply a life jacket for a fee
items.subject: Missing life jacket details for the kayaking tour

items.scenario: You are a sophomore hoping to switch from the Tuesday discussion section of your psychology course to the Thursday section because your new part-time job now conflicts with Tuesday afternoons. Registration for the Thursday section closed last week, though two seats still appear open online.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Ashworth. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the Tuesday section no longer fits your new work schedule
Provide details about your current standing in the course
Ask if you can move into the Thursday section despite the closed registration
items.subject: Switching into the Thursday discussion section

items.scenario: You signed up for a monthly membership at a local fitness center that advertised free access to all group fitness classes. This month's statement includes an extra charge for a spin class you assumed was already covered.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Delgado. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the unexpected charge on this month's statement
Explain what the original sign-up materials said about class access
Suggest that the fee be reversed or the policy clarified
items.subject: Unexpected class fee on this month's membership bill

items.scenario: You and a close friend agreed to volunteer together for a weekend food drive at your community center, but a family gathering you cannot miss now overlaps with your assigned shift on Saturday. You still want to contribute somehow.
items.direction: Write an email to Priya. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the scheduling conflict with the family gathering
Suggest another way you could still help with the food drive
Ask if she can find someone else to join for the shift
items.subject: Missing our food drive shift together
